plugins.name: kubernetes-operator
plugins.description: Expert Kubernetes assistant — kubectl, manifests, Helm, GitOps (Flux/Argo CD), security hardening, debugging playbooks, and cluster operations

plugins.name: kagent
plugins.description: Expert guide for kagent — the Kubernetes-native framework for running AI agents: CLI, Agent/ModelConfig/RemoteMCPServer CRDs, MCP tools, A2A subagents, human-in-the-loop approval, memory, IDE integration, and troubleshooting

plugins.name: kgateway
plugins.description: Expert guide for kgateway — the CNCF Kubernetes Gateway API implementation powered by Envoy (formerly Gloo): installation, Gateway/HTTPRoute setup, traffic management, security (TLS, JWT, ext-auth, rate limiting), resiliency, Istio integration, observability, and debugging

plugins.name: fluxcd
plugins.description: Expert guide for Flux CD GitOps on Kubernetes — install/bootstrap, repository structure, Flux resources, SOPS/RBAC security, validation, operations, upgrades, and troubleshooting

plugins.name: argocd
plugins.description: Expert guide for Argo CD GitOps on Kubernetes — install/upgrade, Application/AppProject/ApplicationSet resources, Helm/Kustomize workflows, RBAC/SSO security, operations, HA, and troubleshooting

plugins.name: bash-scripting
plugins.description: Expert guide for writing, hardening, debugging, and reviewing Bash and POSIX shell scripts — strict mode, defensive patterns, safe quoting/expansion, arrays, trap-based cleanup, getopts parsing, ShellCheck/shfmt linting, Bats testing, and Linux/macOS portability

plugins.name: helm
plugins.description: Expert guide for Helm — authoring charts, Go/Sprig templating, the helm CLI and release lifecycle (install/upgrade/rollback), discovering existing charts and repositories, and debugging chart-rendering and release failures with lint, template, dry-run, and manifest inspection
